post.subject: Shit happens
post.body:
Occasionally, yes, often to me, I live with it. But right now i think i can say that i am pretty happy. Its sunny (most of the time) I have enough money to do stuff without worrying too much, works goin ok, when im not working i do fuck all except listen to music and im goin to america in exactly 8 weeks :)

Certain things could be better, but other than that - things arent going too badly at all! Go Me!
